description.ko: 지구의 표면을 고화질로 탐구한 시각적 기록으로, 지질학적 형성 과정, 퇴적층, 그리고 지구의 다양한 물리적 지형이 지닌 거친 아름다움을 포착합니다.
description.en: A high-definition visual exploration of the planet's skin, capturing the rugged beauty of geological formations, sediment layers, and the diverse physical topography of the Earth.

prompt: Hyper-realistic macro photography of Earth's surface texture, intricate patterns of cracked desert soil merging with lush mossy canyons and iridescent mineral veins, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, top-down perspective, organic flows of sediment and erosion, earthy tones with vibrant turquoise and copper accents
